caption_text: The parity harness · CLI, HTTP, and MCP ship byte-identical artifacts — the beam is the payload

cards.dims_superseded: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: hand-file width citations are ceilings — cards solve to their own ink + anchor pads; the hand file's wider cards are dress history

census_amendments.note: v2 conduit doctrine (diagram-frontier-handoff-pp-v2 hw:tradeoffs): the dashed track is retired — a beam moves through glass, so the engine renders a SOLID casing+rail conduit (two strokes per edge) where this earlier hand file still drew a dashed tube.
